# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-upstream
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 8080
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - users
    routes:
      - name: users-api
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
          - /api/v1/users/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v1
        regex_priority: 0
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags:
          - production
          - public
          - users
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://admin.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Request-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-RateLimit-Limit
                - X-RateLimit-Remaining
                - X-RateLimit-Reset
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 300
              hour: 10000
              policy: local
              hide_client_headers: false
          - name: request-size-limiting
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 10
              size_unit: megabytes
          - name: correlation-id
            config:
              header_name: X-Request-Id
              generator: uuid
              echo_downstream: true

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-upstream
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 8080
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - orders
    routes:
      - name: orders-api
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders
          - /api/v1/orders/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v1
        regex_priority: 0
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags:
          - production
          - private
          - orders
        plugins:
          - name: jwt
            config:
              key_claim_name: iss
              claims_to_verify:
                - exp
          - name: acl
            config:
              allow:
                - internal
                - admin
              hide_groups_header: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 600
              hour: 20000
              policy: local
              hide_client_headers: false
          - name: correlation-id
            config:
              header_name: X-Request-Id
              generator: uuid
              echo_downstream: true

  - name: inventory-service
    url: http://inventory-upstream
    protocol: http
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 8080
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - inventory
    routes:
      - name: inventory-api
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        paths:
          - /api/v1/inventory
          - /api/v1/inventory/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v1
        regex_priority: 0
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags:
          - production
          - private
          - inventory
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              hide_credentials: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 1200
              hour: 50000
              policy: local
              hide_client_headers: false
          - name: request-transformer
            config:
              add:
                headers:
                  - X-Gateway: kong
          - name: correlation-id
            config:
              header_name: X-Request-Id
              generator: uuid
              echo_downstream: true

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
    tags:
      - production
      - users
    targets:
      - target: users-service-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-service-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
    tags:
      - production
      - orders
    targets:
      - target: orders-service-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-service-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: consistent-hashing
    hash_on: header
    hash_on_header: X-Tenant-Id
    hash_fallback: ip
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
    tags:
      - production
      - inventory
    targets:
      - target: inventory-service-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-service-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - production
      - observability

  - name: file-log
    enabled: true
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/access.log
      reopen: true
    tags:
      - production
      - logging

  - name: request-termination
    route: null
    service: null
    consumer: null
    enabled: false
    config:
      status_code: 503
      message: Service unavailable

consumers:
  - username: internal-client
    custom_id: internal-client
    tags:
      - production
      - internal
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: replace-with-secure-api-key
    acls:
      - group: internal

  - username: admin-client
    custom_id: admin-client
    tags:
      - production
      - admin
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: admin-client
        secret: replace-with-secure-jwt-secret
        algorithm: HS256
    acls:
      - group: admin

  - username: partner-client
    custom_id: partner-client
    tags:
      - production
      - partner
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: replace-with-partner-api-key
